Make Something Amazing

Cape Cod Makers is a community workshop at the tip of Cape Cod — open to all skill levels.

Explore Membership Upcoming Events

Our Mission

We provide access to tools, equipment, and a supportive community for makers, artists, engineers, and curious people of all backgrounds on Cape Cod.

Why Join Cape Cod Makers?

🔧

Professional Tools

Access woodworking, metalworking, electronics, 3D printing, and more.

👥

Community

Collaborate with fellow makers, learn new skills, and share expertise.

📚

Workshops & Classes

Attend hands-on workshops and skill-building classes throughout the year.

Ready to Get Started?

Come to an open house, tour the space, and meet our community. No experience required.

View Membership Options Contact Us

Cape Cod Makers

204 Sisson Road
Harwich, MA 02645
info@capecodmakers.org
